x-artifact.note: Design-first artifact only — describes the MCP tool surface, not a running server. Tool input/output schemas $ref the same object schemas as the OpenAPI; each tool maps to an OpenAPI operationId. Surfaces BIC's open regulatory registry (licensees, registrants, wholesale-market businesses, fleet vehicles, violations, complaints) and adds apply_for_license — the net-new write workflow locked today inside the Salesforce Experience Cloud portal.

server.name: io.nyc.bic
server.title: NYC Business Integrity Commission (BIC)
server.description: Agent-native access to the New York City Business Integrity Commission — trade waste hauler licensees, broker/self-hauler/construction-and-demolition registrants, public wholesale-market businesses (Hunts Point, Fulton Fish), the licensee/registrant vehicle fleet, issued violations, and complaints from NYC Open Data, plus the net-new ability to apply for and track a trade waste license/registration that today lives only in the Salesforce Experience Cloud portal.
server.instructions: Use find_licensees / get_licensee to locate trade waste hauler licensees by borough, council district, or free text, and find_registrants for broker, self-hauler, and construction-and-demolition registrations. find_market_businesses covers the public wholesale markets. find_vehicles (and get_licensee_vehicles) returns BIC-plated hauler fleet detail including side-guard compliance. find_violations and find_complaints answer enforcement and integrity questions about a given BIC NUMBER. apply_for_license (net-new) submits a trade waste license/registration/exemption application; it requires an authenticated applicant and mutates state — confirm the industry, application type, and applicant identity with the user before submitting. All registry results are point-in-time Open Data snapshots (see EXPORT DATE).

tools.name: find_licensees
tools.title: Find Licensees
tools.description: Search BIC trade waste hauler licensees by borough, application type, renewal, council district, and/or free text.

tools.name: get_licensee
tools.title: Get Licensee
tools.description: Fetch a trade waste hauler licensee (names, services, dates, geography) by BIC number.

tools.name: get_licensee_vehicles
tools.title: Get Licensee Vehicles
tools.description: List the BIC-plated fleet vehicles operated under a BIC account.

tools.name: find_registrants
tools.title: Find Registrants
tools.description: Search BIC registrants (trade waste broker, self-hauler, construction & demolition) by industry, borough, renewal, or free text.

tools.name: find_market_businesses
tools.title: Find Wholesale Market Businesses
tools.description: List businesses operating in NYC's public wholesale markets (Hunts Point Produce/Meat, Fulton Fish) by market, borough, or free text.

tools.name: find_vehicles
tools.title: Find Fleet Vehicles
tools.description: Search the licensee/registrant hauler fleet by BIC number, active status, side-guard compliance, or fuel type.

tools.name: find_violations
tools.title: Find Violations
tools.description: Search BIC-issued violations by BIC number, violation type, disposition, or date range — fines, rule codes, and OATH/settlement outcomes.

tools.name: find_complaints
tools.title: Find Complaints & Inquiries
tools.description: Search complaints and inquiries about BIC-regulated accounts by BIC number, industry type, status, or borough.

tools.name: list_my_applications
tools.title: List My Applications
tools.description: List the authenticated applicant's own trade waste license applications and their decisions — today visible only inside the Salesforce Experience Cloud portal.

tools.name: apply_for_license
tools.title: Apply for a Trade Waste License
tools.description: Submit a BIC trade waste license, registration, or exemption application (apply). NET-NEW workflow with no public API today — it lives only in the Salesforce Experience Cloud portal (bicportal.nyc.gov) or on paper. Requires an authenticated applicant. Mutates state — confirm industry, application type, and applicant identity first.
